title: I want Advice on Best Way to Set Up Monday.com Integrations
excerpt:
Hey All, 
I have been working with Monday.com for a while now & I am  impressed with how it helps streamline project tasks But  I started thinking about exploring more of its integration options to make my workflows smoo…

posts.author: Gabriellak (Gabriella)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey All,

I have been working with Monday.com for a while now & I am impressed with how it helps streamline project tasks But I started thinking about exploring more of its integration options to make my workflows smoother I know there are built in integrations for tools such as Slack Google Drive & Jira but I want to know how flexible they are when it comes to connecting with less common apps.

For example has anyone here tried building custom integrations through Zapier or Integromat with Monday.com Did it work seamlessly or did you run into any limitations. I want to know if these integrations affect performance when handling larger projects or multiple boards at once.

On a side note I am going through a Power BI Online Training. so I am trying to see how Monday.com data could be connected with BI dashboards too If anyone has tried reporting this way I want to hear how you managed it.

Thank you.

posts.author: zoe.sgt (Zoe | SGTLab)
posts.cookedHtml:
In my case, syncing Google Tasks ↔ Monday has been smooth. It’s interesting because Tasks isn’t as widely supported as Calendar/Docs/Slides, but so far, there are no big limitations.

I’d love to hear what the less common app you’d love to see working seamlessly with Monday is?
